verdict_meaning: Bug CONFIRMED — reproduces on storefront across Chrome + Firefox; ACs unmet (no fix shipped). Ticket is valid and correctly P1. Storybook isolation proves PR #2312 handler code is correct; the defect is purely the VcPopover focus-entry integration gap, exactly as filed.
notes: passed = C5/R1/R2 (no-regression); failed = C1/C2 (core defect); blocked = C3 (blocked-by-C1 = the bug). C4 Storybook isolation = all 12 keys work (code correct).
business_rules_verified: WCAG 2.1.1 Keyboard (Level A) — FAIL in storefront integration (grid unreachable)
WCAG 2.1.2 No Keyboard Trap — PASS (no trap; Escape exits, VCST-5153 item-1 not regressed)
ac_text_correction: Year change binding is Shift+PageUp/PageDown (NOT Ctrl per parent AC text); shipped code follows WAI-ARIA APG — confirmed in Storybook.
incidental_findings: Day grid uses role=application instead of WAI-ARIA APG role=grid
Date-range validation errors expose no aria-invalid / no announced reason (WCAG 3.3.1)
Selected-day pill color contrast 2.11:1 (#fff on #f99e24) vs 4.5:1 needed (WCAG 1.4.3) — pre-existing brand token, verify on Coffee theme
Applied date filter is client-state only — lost on refresh, not deep-linkable
Mitigation: typed date input IS a working keyboard path — lowers practical impact, but the grid widget still fails 2.1.1 standalone

exploratory.charter: Risk charter — VcDatePicker keyboard operability + integration boundaries
